  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Luminaires staged for installation in a suspended ceiling grid lack the required independent support wires or hardware."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Provide and secure independent support wires (minimum of two per luminaire on opposite corners) anchored to the building structure above the ceiling grid."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 410.36(B), luminaires supported by suspended ceiling systems must be securely fastened to the ceiling grid, and the grid itself must be securely supported. Crucially, the luminaires must also be supported independently of the ceiling grid by wires, rods, or other approved means that are securely fastened to the building structure to prevent collapse during a fire or seismic event.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 410.36(B)"
  ]
}
